Singh","details":"This contract serves as the deployment hub for the entire RevvFi protocol.      It uses the clone pattern (EIP-1167) to deploy minimal proxy contracts for each market,      significantly reducing deployment gas costs compared to deploying full contracts.      Key features:      - Deploys per-market clones of Market, Escrow, OfferBook, and LiquidityQueue      - Maintains protocol-wide singleton contracts (ArchController, PositionNFT, Liquidator, ReputationRegistry)      - Validates deployment parameters against protocol guardrails      - Handles fee collection for market deployments      - Supports timelock-protected ArchController upgrades","errors":{"FailedDeployment()":[{"details":"The deployment failed."}],"InsufficientBalance(uint256,uint256)":[{"details":"The ETH balance of the account is not enough to perform the operation."}],"OwnableInvalidOwner(address)":[{"details":"The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)"}],"OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address)":[{"details":"The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation."}],"ReentrancyGuardReentrantCall()":[{"details":"Unauthorized reentrant call."}]},"kind":"dev","methods":{"cancelArchControllerUpdate()":{"details":"Cancels a pending ArchController update"},"constructor":{"details":"Initializes the factory with implementation addresses and configuration","params":{"_deploymentFee":"Fee charged per market deployment (in wei)","_escrowImpl":"Implementation address for CollateralEscrow contracts","_feeRecipient":"Address that receives deployment fees","_liquidityQueueImpl":"Implementation address for LiquidityQueue contracts","_marketImpl":"Implementation address for Market contracts","_offerBookImpl":"Implementation address for OfferBook contracts"}},"deployMarket(address,address,address,address,uint8,uint8,uint256,uint256)":{"details":"Deploys a complete lending market with all associated componentsDeployment flow:      1. Validate all parameters and permissions      2. Clone all four implementation contracts      3. Initialize and configure each component      4. Register the market with all protocol systems","params":{"borrowAsset":"Token that lenders will provide (e.g., USDC)","borrowDecimals":"Decimals of borrow token","borrower":"Address that will control the market (must be registered in ArchController)","collateralAsset":"Token that borrowers will lock (e.g., WETH)","collateralDecimals":"Decimals of collateral token","collateralOracle":"Chainlink oracle address for collateral pricing","liquidationThreshold":"Threshold for liquidation in basis points","minCollateralRatio":"Minimum required collateral ratio in basis points"},"returns":{"marketAddress":"Address of the newly deployed market"}},"executeArchControllerUpdate()":{"details":"Executes a pending ArchController update after timelock expiresReverts if timelock hasn't expired or no update is pending"},"owner()":{"details":"Returns the address of the current owner."},"registerWithArchController()":{"details":"Registers the factory with ArchController as both controller and controller factoryThis grants the factory permission to register markets and deploy controllers"},"renounceOwnership()":{"details":"Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner."},"requestArchControllerUpdate(address)":{"details":"Requests an ArchController update with timelock protectionUpdates are timelocked for TIMELOCK duration to allow for governance review","params":{"newArchController":"Address of the new ArchController"}},"setCoreContracts(address,address,address,address)":{"details":"Sets the core protocol contracts (only callable once by owner)","params":{"_archController":"Address of the ArchController contract","_liquidator":"Address of the Liquidator contract","_positionNFT":"Address of the PositionNFT contract","_reputationRegistry":"Address of the ReputationRegistry contract"}},"setDeploymentFee(uint256)":{"details":"Updates the deployment fee amount","params":{"newFee":"New fee amount in ETH (wei)"}},"setFeeRecipient(address)":{"details":"Updates the fee recipient address","params":{"newRecipient":"New address to receive deployment fees"}},"transferOwnership(address)":{"details":"Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner."}},"stateVariables":{"LIQ_BUFFER":{"details":"Minimum buffer between collateral ratio and liquidation threshold (5%)"},"MAX_CR":{"details":"Maximum allowed collateral ratio (500%) - prevents over-collateralization abuse"},"MIN_CR":{"details":"Minimum allowed collateral ratio (110%) - prevents undercollateralized positions"},"TIMELOCK":{"details":"Timelock duration for ArchController updates (2 days)"},"archController":{"details":"Central registry for permissions and whitelists (set once by owner)"},"archControllerUpdateTimelock":{"details":"Timestamp when the pending ArchController update can be executed"},"coreContractsSet":{"details":"Flag indicating whether core contracts have been set (prevents double initialization)"},"deploymentFee":{"details":"Fee charged for deploying a new market (in wei/ETH)"},"escrowImpl":{"details":"Implementation address for CollateralEscrow contracts (cloned per market)"},"feeRecipient":{"details":"Address that receives deployment fees"},"liquidator":{"details":"Contract handling liquidation auctions (set once by owner)"},"liquidityQueueImpl":{"details":"Implementation address for LiquidityQueue contracts (cloned per market)"},"marketImpl":{"details":"Implementation address for Market contracts (cloned per market)"},"offerBookImpl":{"details":"Implementation address for OfferBook contracts (cloned per market)"},"pendingArchController":{"details":"Pending ArchController address for timelock-protected update"},"positionNFT":{"details":"NFT contract representing lender positions (set once by owner)"},"reputationRegistry":{"details":"Contract tracking borrower reputation (set once by owner)"}},"title":"RevvFiFactory","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"cancelArchControllerUpdate()":{"notice":"Only callable by owner"},"constructor":{"notice":"Core contracts are NOT set in constructor to avoid circular dependencies.         They must be set later via setCoreContracts() after deployment."},"deployMarket(address,address,address,address,uint8,uint8,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Requires payment of deploymentFee in ETH"},"executeArchControllerUpdate()":{"notice":"Only callable by owner"},"registerWithArchController()":{"notice":"Only callable by owner after core contracts are set"},"requestArchControllerUpdate(address)":{"notice":"Only callable by owner"},"setCoreContracts(address,address,address,address)":{"notice":"This resolves the circular dependency between factory and core contracts.         Core contracts are deployed with the factory address, then registered here."},"setDeploymentFee(uint256)":{"notice":"Only callable by owner"},"setFeeRecipient(address)":{"notice":"Only callable by constructor.details: Initializes the factory with implementation addresses and configuration

params._deploymentFee: Fee charged per market deployment (in wei)

deployMarket(address,address,address,add.details: Deploys a complete lending market with all associated componentsDeployment flow:      1. Validate all parameters and permissions      2. Clone all four implementation contracts      3. Initialize and configure each component      4. Register the market with all protocol systems

params.borrowAsset: Token that lenders will provide (e.g., USDC)
params.borrower: Address that will control the market (must be registered in ArchController)
params.collateralAsset: Token that borrowers will lock (e.g., WETH)
params.collateralOracle: Chainlink oracle address for collateral pricing
params.liquidationThreshold: Threshold for liquidation in basis points
params.minCollateralRatio: Minimum required collateral ratio in basis points

returns.marketAddress: Address of the newly deployed market

executeArchControllerUpdate().details: Executes a pending ArchController update after timelock expiresReverts if timelock hasn't expired or no update is pending

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

registerWithArchController().details: Registers the factory with ArchController as both controller and controller factoryThis grants the factory permission to register markets and deploy controllers

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

requestArchControllerUpdate(address).details: Requests an ArchController update with timelock protectionUpdates are timelocked for TIMELOCK duration to allow for governance review

setCoreContracts(address,address,address.details: Sets the core protocol contracts (only callable once by owner)

params.newRecipient: New address to receive deployment fees

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

constructor.notice: Core contracts are NOT set in constructor to avoid circular dependencies.         They must be set later via setCoreContracts() after deployment.

deployMarket(address,address,address,add.notice: Requires payment of deploymentFee in ETH

registerWithArchController().notice: Only callable by owner after core contracts are set

setCoreContracts(address,address,address.notice: This resolves the circular dependency between factory and core contracts.         Core contracts are deployed with the factory address, then registered here.
